label: Canonical Fate Twenty — Lattice Oracle + Ultimate Decision Maker
note: Single source of truth for twenty readings. Face index i (0–19) = face number i+1 on the icosahedron. magic-crystal.html and d20-omnibus-icosa.html fetch this file; do not duplicate the array in those pages.

readings.text: The lattice brightens. A clear yes—step forward in calm.
All vertices hum in phase. The field says: proceed.
Coherence holds. You already know—this path opens.
A small nudge, large effect: the reading leans yes—tune gently and go.
Light takes the warm edge. Trust the green branch.
Synchronicity in the mesh. The answer is a quiet, confident yes.
The K₄ ring answers without drama: affirmation.
The core glows steady. Yes—with room to breathe.
The signal flows. Yes—and celebrate the small proof.
A thin gold line on the rim: yes—dawn, not blinding noon.
The crystal clouds. Ask again when the static thins—go gently.
Indeterminate. The world hasn’t collapsed the bit—wait or reframe.
Signal below your threshold. Silence is data—not yet.
The edge shimmers both ways. Neither branch claims you tonight.
Hold one slow breath, ask shorter. Then return to the stone.
The lattice dims. A soft no for now—not never; protect the spark.
Drag in the field. Do not push the river—stand aside.
The reading scatters. Guard your energy—choose repair over proof.
Vertices disagree. Defer—clarity is downstream.
A cool line through the heart of the glass: no, for this moment.
